verses.geez:
An account of the creation, and a resumé of Scripture
              history down to the reign of Jehoram

words.g:
An account of the creation and a resumé of Scripture
              history down to the reign of Jehoram
words.t:
An account of the creation and a resumé of Scripture
              history down to the reign of Jehoram

note: The Mysteries of Heaven and Earth. Ethiopian cosmological speculation about the structure of creation, the nature of the Trinity, and the hidden architecture of reality. Esoteric tradition preserved in the canonical Bible.
